overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game, showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban intersection. The player waits at a crosswalk beneath an overpass before crossing the street amidst pedestrians, surrounded by towering buildings with holographic billboards and vibrant cyan and orange neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk corner at futuristic intersection

events.description: pedestrian walk signal turns green, ego prepares to cross the street

agents.ego_description: standing at the corner under the overpass, observing the intersection and waiting for the walk signal

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing near the corner, waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: large angular concrete and metal overpass with orange and white geometric patterns providing cover
multi-story industrial building with prominent teal and cyan structural accents and illuminated windows
large vertical holographic advertisement displaying PASSION text with a portrait, mounted on the building facade
dense collection of glowing neon signs in red, cyan, and orange advertising various businesses
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Standing under a massive orange and white overpass at the edge of a cyberpunk intersection, surrounded by the glow of neon signs and holographic billboards. The teal industrial building dominates the view across the street while pedestrians gather nearby, waiting for the signal to change.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian crosswalk in cyberpunk downtown

events.description: ego begins walking forward across the yellow crosswalk as the walk signal activates
passing the midpoint of the wide intersection, continuing toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide intersection, navigating through other pedestrians crossing in various directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white pants and dark jacket walking ahead in the same direction across the crosswalk

entered.detail: orange and white striped traffic barrier and bollards marking the crosswalk edge
concrete sidewalk on the far side of the street lined with additional neon storefronts

segments.scene_description: Moving through the wide intersection on the yellow crosswalk, leaving the overpass behind as the teal industrial building shifts to the left. The camera advances toward the opposite sidewalk lined with vibrant neon storefronts, sharing the crosswalk with other pedestrians while surrounded by the glow of holographic advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered urban overpass into the heart of a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk intersection. It begins stationary beneath a massive orange and white overpass, where the glow of holographic billboards illuminates a crowd of pedestrians waiting beside a dominant teal industrial building. As the signal changes, the camera advances forward onto the yellow crosswalk, leaving the shelter of the overpass behind. The perspective shifts as the teal building slides to the left, opening the view to a wide street filled with other pedestrians and shimmering advertisements. The scene finally concludes as the camera reaches the opposite sidewalk, moving closer to a row of storefronts drenched in vivid neon light.
